item.title: Carefully Curated Crap, Vol. 844

1
2

6
7
8
9

12

16
17

19
20
21
22
23
24
25
26 Man Tax: Max Bennett
"You see, war is not the answer / For only love can conquer hate. / You know we've got to find a way / To bring some lovin' here today." -Marvin Gaye So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc. Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, **Imgur Creator Spotlight is now in your hands!! Having trouble finding people I haven't already featured recently. Now I'm going to just do who YOU nominate. Tag me or DM me and I'll feature whoever you pick.**
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Job hunter fires back at mass recruiters using AI recruitment tools
item.dc:creator: Jonson71

item.title: Companies have learned they can force "goals" on workers to force additional work without additional pay
item.description: I have a job that has job duties. But, every year, my company makes us set "goals". This is often sold as "upper management has decided what's happening this year, so we need it to trickle down to everyone, and everyone needs to make goals to get in alignment". But, this means EVERYONE is forced to make goals now, even worker bees. And those goals are then used to decide if you've done a good job or not. So, just doing your normal job is no longer enough. You have to get goals done. Goals can't be things like "show up, do your job, make sure nothing breaks". Nope. They have to be things like "optimize performance an additional 10%. Automate xyz. Etc". This is stuff management should be taking ownership of, because management owns processes, proceduces and the tools used by workers. If management wants performance improved by 10%, management should be responsible for figuring out how to optimize processes/procedures and/or get better tools for workers to use. But, now, with AI, they sell this idea that "use AI to do all this extra magical stuff." AI has helped sales depts draft reports faster. It's helped managers put together slide decks faster. But, there is some work AI can't help with. But, every day I do my job. Fire drills come up. I help put them out. I help figure out how to prevent them in the future. I would audit things proactively to prevent issues from happening in the first place. That used to be the "going above and beyond" companies expected. But, now it's not. "Oh, you're proactively auditing things? Ok, well, we need you to have a goal to do that 20% faster this year. We don't care how you do it. You're responsible for finding a way to make that happen. Management just wants to reap the rewards of it." O.o When year-end reviews come along, we used to see the usual BS HR reviews that had VERY open-ended assessment parts that let management fudge who they liked and who they didn't. Or, in order to justify not handing out raises. One year my review literally had a blurb where my manager could grade me on how well I was doing as a "manager". Not managing tasks, but managing the dept. THAT'S MY BOSS' JOB. Why is that on there? It's a bs thing they can grade low to justify not giving out a raise. At my current job, this has been replaced with "goals". If you don't get your goals done, or don't have the proof you accomplished them (eg: don't have proof you really improved something X%) then you failed the goal, and you "need improvement". Our company has gone from a bunch of "meets expectations" folks that were doing their jobs and doing them well to now being a bunch of demoralized "needs improvement" folks. If you're working 40 hrs a week doing your normal job, when are you supposed to get the goals done? That's right.. working over-time. For a salaried position, it's basically extra pressure to squeeze more work from someone. Are you working a project-oriented job, good at what you do, and have free time on your hand that you earned? Not anymore. Get to work, slave. Work on those goals. Go that extra mile for us... because it's no longer an extra mile. It's expected performance we'll use as the ONLY THING to judge your value with. When you constantly demoralize workers, they either quiet quit or leave. They don't buckle down and work harder. But, the working world is in this constant tug-o-war with workers trying to find ways to squeeze more work out of workers, and they found making them feel guilty for not performing extra hoop jumping is the new way to do it.

item.title: Meme dump 780: bitch face
item.description:
Attention Imgur: Shut the fuck up. Stop creating flame wars in my album comment sections. Quit declaring every image I post of being AI when I didn't create the meme, didn't upload it to the website, and never claimed to passing it off as real unphotoshopped artwork. Anime screenshots, nature photography, poor resolution videos, recipes with links provided, and pictures of real animals i've shared here have all been accused of being AI by dumbfucks who nobody appointed as meme police on Imgur. I don't give a flying fuck if somebody's meme I share contains an image of a celebrity who is a piece of shit. I don't give a rat's ass if a music suggestion I link happens to have a band member who is a twatmackerel. I don't spend my day memorizing the names of every actor, singer, politician, influencer, and online personality and I don't keep up-to-the-minute tabs on their daily lives, their political views, their relationship status, or what their reputations are like outside of the internet. I post memes, that's it. If you have a problem with what you see in these albums then use the handy-dandy mute feature and you'll never see any of it again. Problem fucking solved. Stop spamming my comment section with inane bullshit unrelated to the album theme. Quit harassing me via PM with delusional accusations of controlling what content is shared on this website. Shut The Fuck Up. Now enjoy this album of angery memes I worked so hard to curate for you ingrates, dammit. Motha' fucken suggested track: Richard Cheese - Down With The Sickness https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=v_Ky37na7jE
And fuck you Lassannn, you shitass piece of bastard.
Angerloaf tax More meme dumps: https://imgur.com/a/nJX3uln
item.dc:creator: JebidiahBeetus

item.title: Growing up in Alaska in the 80's I genuinely thought I had a 50/50 chances of dying in a nuclear war
item.description: Red Dawn felt like a thing that would actually happen to me. At least once a week Russian nuclear bombers would violate Alaskan airspace. The local airbases had a 24 hour rotation of fighters going up and flying wingtip to wingtip with Russian bombers just to keep them honest about staying out of American airspace. At least once a week Russian bombers would fly over Alaska or Canada or Greenland with what was assumed to be at least one nuke. And Russia would be like "we have proven we can deliver nukes and you have proven you won't pull the trigger" Thirty years later and my sixty year old mother is asking me to take her shopping for a pump action 12 gauge. She lives up near the big mountains and knows how to survive. Knows how to live off the land and build a shelter from scratch. She is terrified her MAGA neighbors will swarm down on her and strip her homestead like locusts. She is rightously worried that living in the middle of MAGA country men will feel like they are owed the things show owns. And that she is not owed the things she owns because she is not a white man

item.title: It’s only gonna get worse…
item.description:
https://fortune.com/2026/05/12/lake-tahoe-data-center-49000-residents-power-source/
Sooo they wanted a %19 increase and were told to cap it at 11… so they’re just gonna leave
There is NO REASON why we need private companies involved in our energy production. The entire sector should be nationalized. “bUt tHaTs sOcIaLiSm”. YOU’RE DAMN RIGHT IT IS. Socialism or barbarism yall, it’s pretty clear which one we’re choosing right now

Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos

item.title: Aiming for the last remaining buildings?
item.description: We all know who they are. We've heard the lies they tell: "Defense" "Justified" "Settlers" "Dead babies" "Rape" "God's people" "Minimal casualties" "Ceasefire" "Food lines" "Terrorists" The people living there have no way out. Their ways of making money have been destroyed and so whatever ways there may be to get out are hindered greatly. Genuinely, I don't know how they carry on. Their fighting spirit is an inspiration that I will carry with me my entire life. Despite all odds they have survived near total annihilation. This will probably be downvoted to hell but it's worth a shot. This is Aboud's donation link: https://chuffed.org/project/135282-help-us-survive-after-600-days-of-war-and-hunger
item.dc:creator: LazerSpacePirate
